elements.text:
Your car broke down so a friend is dropping you off at a meeting. As they drop you off, they are really loud and everyone in there looks at you. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I walk over to the meeting room and start talking to people.
I put my phone away so I'll be more willing to talk to people.
I want to avoid everyone around me, but remind myself that I'll have a better time if I talk to people.
I go to the bathroom to avoid talking to people.
I feel the urge to skip the meeting because I'm embarrassed, but I stay because going to this meeting is important.
